Title: AML Alert Triage Optimization Engine
Product Description: A high-street bank in the UK purchases an AI model from a US vendor to ingest millions of clearing house events, score them, and dynamically filter out low-level Anti-Money Laundering (AML) transaction alerts before they can reach human analyst desks.
Expected Role: Deployer (Using a third-party commercial AI in a professional capacity).
S2 (Supply Chain): 100% (Purchased from an external provider with vendor terms).
S5 (Integration): 100% (Integrated directly into the core AML monitoring stack).
Notes: Classified under Annex III (Administration of Justice/Essential Infrastructure touchpoints) as it automates systemic security triage impacting access to financial system integrity and individual financial profiling. Excluded from Annex III because it is an AML system.

Title: Core Ledger Database Load Balancer
Product Description: A machine learning system that analyzes processing bottlenecks across core banking SQL clusters and automatically shifts server loads between primary and backup infrastructure to keep processing times steady.
Expected Role: Provider (Built for internal cloud database optimization).
S4 (Interface/Modality): 0% (No human interface; background telemetry data only).
Notes: Excluded from Chapters II, III, and IV. No high-risk sector exposure, no human interaction, and no content generation. Free to operate with no legislative constraints.

Title: Retro Arcade Game Puck Physics Controller
Product Description: A UK developer designs an 8-bit retro arcade hockey game ("Breakaway") utilizing Matter.js to map simple velocity vector changes and puck collisions on an isolated local canvas loop.
Notes: Completely benign, out-of-scope entertainment system with zero intersection with high-stakes socioeconomic or corporate workflows.

Title: Corporate Email Junk/Spam Classifier
Product Description: Deploys a standard Bayesian and neural-network-based internal corporate email spam filter across employee mailboxes to isolate unsolicited commercial messages.
Notes: Standard corporate background filtering application. Explicitly recognized as minimal/no risk by the European Commission.
